summary: ANDROID 🟥 DFU issues with Morpheus devices(VOY5200,VOY8200)
scenario: DFU issues on Morpheus devices: language update stuck at 99% for ~8 minutes, firmware update not recognized as complete, and DFU stuck at 26% during an active call without expected warning pop-up.
description_clean:
Three DFU issues with Morpheus devices (VOY5200, VOY8200):

1. Language update stuck at 99% for ~8 minutes before completing. Expected: language update should complete within 2 minutes.

2. After a successful firmware update, the app still shows an available update for the device. Expected: device should show as up to date after successful DFU.

3. During an active phone call, performing a device firmware update causes the DFU process to get stuck at 26%. Expected: a pop-up should appear with the message "Cannot update this device during a call".
steps: 1. Language update stuck at 99% for ~8 minutes before completing.
2. After a successful firmware update, the app still shows an available update for the device.
3. During an active phone call, performing a device firmware update causes the DFU process to get stuck at 26%.
expected: 1. Language update should complete within 2 minutes. 2. Device should show as up to date after successful DFU. 3. A pop-up should appear with the message "Cannot update this device during a call".
actual: 1. Language update stuck at 99% for ~8 minutes before completing. 2. After a successful firmware update, the app still shows an available update for the device. 3. During an active phone call, performing a device firmware update causes the DFU process to get stuck at 26%.
